api: WordPress REST API v2 (core, https://developer.wordpress.org/rest-api/reference/) -- the standard endpoint set every stock WordPress install exposes under /wp-json/wp/v2/, verified against both the reference docs and a live core-only site (developer.wordpress.org's own /wp-json/ index and direct GETs against its live endpoints, fetched 2026-07-03)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 10 read streams (the 7 legacy-parity streams plus taxonomies, types, statuses) and 20 write actions (create/update/delete for posts, pages, comments, users, categories, tags; update/delete only for media, no create_media since WordPress core media creation requires a raw-binary multipart upload this dialect cannot express). users create/update/delete carry WordPress's own required password (create) and force/reassign (delete) semantics. Excluded: plugins/themes/settings/sidebars/widgets (admin-capability-gated management surfaces, not general content-sync data), menu-locations/search (site-specific auth gating observed live, or no natural incremental-sync shape), and the full block-editor/site-editor v2 surface (blocks, templates, template-parts, navigation, menus, menu-items, global-styles, font-families, block-types, block-patterns, block-directory, widget-types, application-passwords) which is Gutenberg/full-site-editing tooling metadata, not general content data most WordPress integrations sync.

excluded.reason: single-post detail; identical record shape to the posts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
post-edit revision history, not the current-state object the posts stream already syncs; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
in-progress unsaved-draft snapshot, not a durable syncable object; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
paired read endpoint is out of scope; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-page detail; identical record shape to the pages list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
page-edit revision history, not the current-state object the pages stream already syncs; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
in-progress unsaved-draft snapshot, not a durable syncable object; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
paired read endpoint is out of scope; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-comment detail; identical record shape to the comments list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
creating a media/attachment item requires a raw binary file upload in the request body with a Content-Disposition filename header, not a JSON/form record body this dialect's write actions can express
single-media-item detail; identical record shape to the media list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
server-side image-edit transform (crop/rotate) side effect, not a plain data-field update; update_media already covers metadata fields
internal upload post-processing trigger, not a data-record mutation
attaches a raw binary sub-file to an existing attachment; same multipart limitation as media creation
single-user detail; identical record shape to the users list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
authenticated caller's own user record; same shape already reachable in the users list stream
authenticated-caller self-update, not a collection-scoped mutation
self-service account deletion of the authenticated caller; delete_user already covers id-scoped user deletion
application-password credential management, a security/auth-provisioning surface, not general content data
issues new API credentials for a user; a credential-provisioning action, not a plain data write
revokes ALL of a user's issued API credentials; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-category detail; identical record shape to the categories list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-tag detail; identical record shape to the tags list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-taxonomy detail; identical record shape to the taxonomies list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-post-type detail; identical record shape to the types list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-post-status detail; identical record shape to the statuses list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
keyword-search endpoint, not a naturally enumerable/incremental object collection; requires a caller-supplied search term with no connector-level default

verified live: returns 401 rest_cannot_view for an unauthenticated/non-admin caller on a real WordPress install even though the reference docs list it under public endpoints; menu/navigation metadata, not general content data
single-menu-location detail; paired list endpoint is out of scope
verified live: requires activate_plugins-capability admin auth (401 on an unauthenticated/non-admin caller); site-administration inventory, not general content data
installs and activates a new plugin on the site, an admin-only site-administration action

activates/deactivates a plugin, an admin-only site-administration action
uninstalls a plugin from the site, an admin-only site-administration action
verified live: requires edit_theme_options-capability admin auth (401 on an unauthenticated/non-admin caller); site-administration inventory, not general content data
single-theme detail; paired list endpoint is out of scope
site-wide configuration (title, timezone, default category, etc), an admin-capability-gated singleton, not a per-record content collection
